ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (RecordType.Name = "SDR" || RecordType.Name = "Chat") && (IsPickVal(Status__c,"Completed")|| IsPickVal(Status__c,"Unqualified")) && (IsBlank (Meeting_Summary_and_Next_Steps__c)|| IsBlank(Budget__c) || IsBlank(Need_Value__c) || IsBlank(Way_forward__c)) && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please update all sales post meeting notes.
